popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SICILY.htm#Manfreddied1266B as of 3/28/2016

MANFRED von Hohenstaufen, son of Emperor FRIEDRICH II & his mistress Bianca Lancia (Venosa 1232-killed in battle …

events.name: Death of Parent
events.place: Gioia Del Colle, Taranto, Puglia, Italy

events.name: He defeated the papal army at Foggia.
Battle at Foggia
events.place: Defeated papal army of Pope Innocent Iv/Foggia, Puglia, Italy

events.name: He was the target of a Crusadem, called first by Pope Alexander IV and then by Urban IV. Nothing came of Alexander's call, but Urban enlisted the aid of Charles of Anjou in overthrowing Manfred.
He deposed his nephew and was coronated as Manfredo, King of Sicily.
Birth of Child

zh.lifeSummary: 當Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen於大約1232年出生在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫巴勒莫時，他的父親Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor39歲，母親Bianca Lancia d'agliano23歲。他和Beatrice de Savoie至少有1個女兒。他去世於1266年2月26日在義大利坎帕尼亞貝尼文托貝尼文托享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Manfredo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, borne by a 13th-century king of Sicily. See Manfred .

en.lifeSummary: When Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen was born about 1232, in Palermo, Palermo, Sicily, Italy, his father, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, was 39 and his mother, Bianca Lancia d'agliano, was 23. He had at least 1 daughter with Beatrice de Savoie. He died on 26 February 1266, in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italy, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen est né environ 1232, à Palermo, Palermo, Sicile, Italie, son père, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Bianca Lancia d'agliano, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Beatrice de Savoie. Il est décédé le 26 février 1266, à Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italie, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen um 1232 in Palermo, Palermo, Sizilien, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor 39 und seine Mutter Bianca Lancia d'agliano 23. Er hatte mit Beatrice de Savoie mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. Februar 1266 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen è nato il circa 1232 nel Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Italia, il suo padre, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Bianca Lancia d'agliano, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Beatrice de Savoie. Morì il 26 febbraio 1266, nel Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufenが約1232年にイタリアシシリアプアラーモプアラーモで生まれた時，父Frederick II Holy Roman Emperorは39歳，母Bianca Lancia d'aglianoは23歳であった。彼はBeatrice de Savoieとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1266年2月26日にイタリアカンプアニアベンエベントーベンエベントーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen(이)가 대략 1232년 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모 파일모에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Bianca Lancia d'agliano(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Savoie(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 2월 26일 이탈리아 캠파니아 베네븐토 베네븐토에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen nasceu aproximadamente 1232, em Palermo, Palermo, Sicilia, Itália, seu pai, Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Bianca Lancia d'agliano, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Beatrice de Savoie. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1266, em Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Itália, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Re di Sicilia Manfredo von Hohenstaufen родился около 1232 г. в местности пеилирмо, пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия, его отцу по имени Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Bianca Lancia d'agliano, 23. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Beatrice de Savoie. Он умер 26 февраля 1266 г. в местности бинивенто, бинивенто, кампаня, Италия в возрасте 35 лет.
